creator: romain@FreeBSD.org
text:
A puppet@ alias was recently created to allow the maintainers of the various Puppet-related ports working and communicating more easily.

The ports MAINTAINER lines where updated accordingly, but problem reports are not assigned to "puppet", e.g. #222125.

I tried to assign it manually, and it fails with the following message:

> Assignee: 	
> puppet@FreeBSD.org did not match anything

I guess something has to be set in bugzilla to allow assigning bugs to this team, hence this message.

Thanks!
